name: mojo-dirpath-trailing-slash-normalization
description: Fix double-slash path construction in Mojo when a dirpath already has a trailing slash. Use when: (1) save_named_tensors or load_named_tensors produces paths like 'dir//file.weights', (2) directory listing or file write fails because of double slashes in constructed paths, (3) docstring examples show trailing slash but function does not normalize it.
